GUARDIAN-BRACE.title: Brace
GUARDIAN-BRACE.description: Reduce the HP loss required to trigger [gold]Mode Shift[/gold].
GUARDIAN-ACCELERATE.title: Accelerate
GUARDIAN-ACCELERATE.description: Reduce the turn counter of the right-most card in [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-STASIS.title: Stasis
GUARDIAN-STASIS.description: A card in Stasis stays there for amount of turns equal to its cost plus 1. When it exits, it is returned to your hand and is free until played.
GUARDIAN-TICK.title: Tick
GUARDIAN-TICK.description: Tick effects activate whenever this card's [gold]Stasis[/gold] counter is reduced.
GUARDIAN-POLISH.title: Polish
GUARDIAN-POLISH.description: Reduce your [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] by X. Convert X stacks of temporary buffs into permanent buffs.
